testCaseName: Apply for a Job Based on Company
testCaseDescription: Verify that a candidate can search jobs by company name, extract the jobId, apply for the job, and confirm the application appears in the dashboard with status PENDING

steps.step: Login with candidate credentials: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login
Search jobs by company name: GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs?company=CloudNine%20Technologies
Extract jobId from the search response
steps.responseBody: jobId = 3 (extracted from data[0].id where company = CloudNine Technologies)

steps.step: Apply for the job: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Verify application appears in the dashboard: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my

testCaseName: Apply for a Job Based on Job Title
testCaseDescription: Verify that a candidate can search jobs by job title, extract the jobId, apply for the job, and confirm the application appears in the dashboard with status PENDING

steps.step: Login with candidate credentials: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login
Search jobs by job title: GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs?title=Full%20Stack%20Developer
Extract jobId from the search response
steps.responseBody: jobId = 3 (extracted from data[0].id where title = Full Stack Developer)

steps.step: Apply for the job: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Verify application appears in the dashboard: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my

testCaseName: Apply for a Job Based on Location
testCaseDescription: Verify that a candidate can search jobs by location, extract the jobId, apply for the job, and confirm the application appears in the dashboard with status PENDING

steps.step: Login with candidate credentials: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login
Search jobs by location: GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs?location=Bangalore%2C%20India
steps.responseBody:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Jobs retrieved",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "title": "Software Developer",
      "description": "Java backend developer role",
      "location": "Bangalore, India",
      "company": "TechCorp Solutions",
      "salary": "8,00,000 - 15,00,000",
      "type": "FULL_TIME",
      "active": true
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "title": "Full Stack Developer",
      "description": "Full Stack Developer role at CloudNine Technologies",
      "location": "Bangalore, India",
      "company": "CloudNine Technologies",
      "salary": "12,00,000 - 20,00,000",
      "type": "FULL_TIME",
      "active": true
    }
  ]
}

steps.step: Extract jobId of the preferred job from the location-based search response
steps.responseBody: jobId = 1 (extracted from data[0].id where location = Bangalore, India)

steps.step: Apply for the job: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Verify application appears in the dashboard: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my

testCaseName: Apply for a Job with Highest Salary
testCaseDescription: Verify that a candidate can search jobs sorted by salary descending, apply for the top result (highest salary), and confirm the application appears in the dashboard with status PENDING

steps.step: Login with candidate credentials: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login
Search jobs sorted by salary descending: GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs?company=CloudNine%20Technologies&title=Full%20Stack%20Developer&location=Bangalore%2C%20India&sortBy=salary&order=desc
steps.responseBody:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Jobs retrieved",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 5,
      "title": "Full Stack Developer",
      "description": "Senior Full Stack Developer role",
      "location": "Bangalore, India",
      "company": "CloudNine Technologies",
      "salary": "20,00,000 - 30,00,000",
      "type": "FULL_TIME",
      "active": true
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "title": "Full Stack Developer",
      "description": "Mid-level Full Stack Developer role",
      "location": "Bangalore, India",
      "company": "CloudNine Technologies",
      "salary": "12,00,000 - 20,00,000",
      "type": "FULL_TIME",
      "active": true
    }
  ]
}

steps.step: Extract jobId of the top result (highest salary) from the search response
steps.responseBody: jobId = 5 (extracted from data[0].id — highest salary: 20,00,000 - 30,00,000)

steps.step: Apply for the highest salary job: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Verify application appears in the dashboard: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my

testCaseDescription: Verify that applying to the same jobId twice returns 409 Conflict as per the duplicate application business rule

steps.step: Login with candidate credentials: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login
Apply for the job first time: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Apply for the same job again: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications

testCaseDescription: Verify that GET /api/applications/my returns all submitted applications with job title, company, location, status and appliedAt for the logged-in candidate

steps.step: Login with candidate credentials: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login
Retrieve all applications for the logged-in candidate: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my
Verify each entry contains job.title, job.company, job.location, status and appliedAt
steps.responseBody: Each entry has: job.title, job.company, job.location, status in [PENDING, REVIEWED, SHORTLISTED, ACCEPTED, REJECTED], appliedAt in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss)

testCaseName: E2E: Search by All Parameters, Apply and View Dashboard
testCaseDescription: End-to-end flow: login as candidate, search for Full Stack Developer at CloudNine Technologies in Bangalore sorted by highest salary, apply for the top result, and verify the application appears in the dashboard with status PENDING

steps.step: Login with candidate credentials: POST http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login

Search jobs using all parameters sorted by salary desc: GET http://localhost:5000/api/jobs?company=CloudNine%20Technologies&title=Full%20Stack%20Developer&location=Bangalore%2C%20India&sortBy=salary&order=desc
Extract top-result jobId (highest salary) from the search response
steps.responseBody: jobId = 5 (top result: salary = 20,00,000 - 30,00,000, company = CloudNine Technologies)

steps.step: Apply for the top-result job: POST http://localhost:5000/api/applications
Verify the new application appears in the dashboard: GET http://localhost:5000/api/applications/my
